name: NUB Music Bot
description: 🔥 Ultimate Telegram Voice Chat Music Bot — HD audio/video streaming, multi-language support, premium UI. Powered by Pyrogram (Kurigram) and PyTgCalls.

API_ID.description: Telegram App API ID — get from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Telegram App API Hash — get from https://my.telegram.org

STRING_SESSION.description: Pyrogram v2 user session string for the assistant account

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram user ID (get it from @userinfobot)

YOUTUBE_API_KEYS.description: Comma-separated YouTube Data API v3 keys — get from https://console.cloud.google.com (10K req/day free each). Leave blank to use yt-dlp fallback only.

LOGGER_ID.description: Chat ID of a group/channel to receive error logs

NUB_YT_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for external YouTube API proxy (optional)

YT_API_TOKEN.description: Auth token for the external YouTube API proxy (optional)
